entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, this is Marcus Thompson. I’d like to schedule an appointment, please.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please tell me your date of birth. Please tell me your date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure, my date of birth is August 22, 1990.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You're all set, Marcus. How can I help today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I'd like to book an appointment sometime next week if possible. What’s your earliest availability?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me check some openings for next week. I found that you already have an appointment of this type on file, so I can't book a second one. I'll hand this over to live support so they can help with scheduling or changes. I found an existing appointment on your file, so I can't book a new one right here. I can connect you to our patient support team. However, I'm a pretty good AI and can do many of the things an operator can. Do you want to give me a try?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure, let's go ahead. While I have you—can I ask, is it okay to take ibuprofen with metformin?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I can't provide medical advice on that. I'll document your question and let our clinic support team know. They will get back to you as soon as they can.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Okay, I understand. Thanks. One more thing—my A1C came back at 7.2 last week, should I be worried?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I'm sorry to hear that. I'm not able to assess lab results or tell you whether you should be worried. If you have symptoms like severe thirst, vomiting, confusion, or trouble breathing, call 911 or go to urgent care now. Would you like me to pass this along to the clinic for follow-up?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, that would be helpful, thank you. And one last question—my doctor mentioned maybe adjusting my insulin dose. Do you think I should increase it before my appointment?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I understand. Thanks for checking. I'll wait to hear from the clinic team about that.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Your question has been documented and sent to the clinic team. They'll review the A1C result and the insulin dose question and get back to you as soon as they can.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Great, I appreciate that. I'll wait to hear from them. Thanks again for your help.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Take care, talk to you soon.
